4 = American Indian and Alaska Native (AIAN), non-Hispanic 
5 = Hawaiian/Pacific Islander 
6 = Multiracial, non-Hispanic 
7 = Hispanic, all races 
Null/missing = source value is missing, unknown, or not Medicaid enrolled
